---
title: "Reading #6 Problem 2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
mtcars_nested<- mtcars|>
  filter(cyl == 4)|>
  select(mpg, cyl)
```

Rewrite this in nested form on a single line. Which set of commands do you prefer and why?

```{r}
unnest(mtcars_nested)
```

I keep getting an error which means I am not using the unnest function properly but it seems like the most reasonable option here. Do the unnest and nest functions only work with lists?
